data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of 'Substitution history tracking' but failed to provide any concrete evidence of its existence or functionality. The linked use case mentions the need for a substitution log for fairness tracking, yet no actual data or API responses were presented to demonstrate that this feature is operational. This lack of evidence leads to a clear gap in meeting the requirement.
gaps: No evidence of substitution history tracking implementation.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add evidence for substitution history tracking
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Verify that the substitution history is being logged and can be retrieved.
